{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321011404DE3770FB569335F91CCB"}"},"total":78},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585218045096215358","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈好新奇的角度hhh女主是真的三次元在二次元，不敢想象女主睁开眼就是一群纸片人的日子哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]太好看了，作者大大加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766073951,"group_id":"7503420089392172057","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5nHAPH4Qrbf+6ars3p7/cA8RO7XfMP0i9G5ek5F6rCV","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bdf2060fc5034338a3bedb7db78b6d97~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620151&x-signature=ypP09Y4jE3YMv%2FzoFzHHmur%2FeKE%3D","user_id":"1717863511231609","user_name":"喜欢祁煜的鱼鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1717863511231609","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503420089392172057","book_info":{"abstract":"【综柯学+咒回+文野+刀乱，带一点家教和夏目】
林星瑶做好人好事的时候不小心被大卡车创进了二次元世界，等她一睁眼，嚯！目之所及全是扁的！
怪不得都说二次元是纸片人呢，还真是纸片人啊？
等等，她的二次元老公们呢，不会也都是扁的吧？
再等等，那……某些地方呢，不会也是扁的吧？！
死神小学生：世界是科学的，再不济也是柯学的。
林星瑶：是扁的！
死神小学生：……
绷带精：拜托了，把我从这个腐败的世界里叫醒吧！
林星瑶：你是个纸片人，他也是纸片人，你们都是纸片人！
绷带精：……
麻辣教师：苍！赫！茈！
林星瑶：miss! miss! miss!（无法选中目标）
麻辣教师：……
刀子精们：主公请留步！
林星瑶：哎我去，这破ppt游戏怎么都真人快打了还是扁的！
刀子精们：……啊？
林星瑶：世界是扁的！所有人都是扁的！我没疯！我没疯！！
叠甲声明：一家之言，ooc难免，对角色的理解有出入也正常，这些难以避免（划重点）！而且文笔大纲都没有，纯粹想到什么写什么，逻辑伏笔都是硬憋硬圆，有没有戳你们雷点的情节我实在不清楚，反正都不是我的雷点，数据不好我也认了，不喜请点叉，速速退出，及时止损！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0396538e9e1bfb51692ad30d978c1cc0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"连羲","author_id":"","book_id":"7503420089392172057","book_name":"综漫：就是看扁你，那咋了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0c8b8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3984人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7503443261642506814","read_count":"3984","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"477622"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"199","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,综漫,异世穿越,二次元,魂穿,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0396538e9e1bfb51692ad30d978c1cc0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779210844&x-signature=jKi8BQ%2BjD6TPIG0ZvI%2FnuKhUZlc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"bo
